tests.code:
errs = validate_order({'items': [{'price': 10}], 'customer': 'Alice', 'total': 10})
assert errs == [], f'Expected no errors, got {errs}'

errs = validate_order({})
assert 'no items' in errs and 'no customer' in errs

errs = validate_order({'items': [], 'customer': 'Bob', 'total': -5})
assert 'no items' in errs and 'negative total' in errs

r = process_order({'items': [{'price': 5}, {'price': 3}], 'customer': 'Carol'})
assert r['total'] == 8 and r['item_count'] == 2
